instructions: Copy the EnvExampleProps interface from the env.example file and paste it into the SoundAndHapticFeedbackSystem.ts file to define the props for the EnvExample component
Replace the existing userPreferences import in the SoundAndHapticFeedbackSystem.ts file with the const { userPreferences } = useStore() line from the env.example file
Update the SoundAndHapticFeedbackSystem.tsx file by wrapping its content with the div element from the env.example file, which includes the dynamic styles for backgroundColor, color, and border
